# Twin Expeditions

Twin Expeditions offers private, off-path expeditions in Timor-Leste and Indonesia for adventurous travelers who want local access, real logistics, and respectful travel rather than packaged mass tourism.

Website: https://twinexpeditions.com/
Contact: requesttwinexpeditions@gmail.com
WhatsApp: +49 1522 2454651

## Main Expeditions

- Blue Whales of Timor-Leste: private blue whale swimming and freediving expeditions with local crew. Season focus: October and November. Max 5 guests per private group. URL: https://twinexpeditions.com/timor-leste-blue-whale.html
- Papua Expeditions: private expeditions for fit adventurers, including Asmat 5D/4N, Korowai 7D/6N, Asmat plus Korowai 10D/9N, and Nabire whale shark logistics support. URL: https://twinexpeditions.com/papua.html
- Flores Expedition: private overland expedition by bemo from Labuan Bajo to Lamalera, including Wae Rebo, Kelimutu, local villages, culture, and Lamalera. URL: https://twinexpeditions.com/flores.html

## German Pages

- Start: https://twinexpeditions.com/de/
- Blauwale in Timor-Leste: https://twinexpeditions.com/de/timor-leste-blue-whale.html
- Papua Expeditionen: https://twinexpeditions.com/de/papua.html
- Flores Expedition: https://twinexpeditions.com/de/flores.html

## Helpful Pages

- FAQ: https://twinexpeditions.com/faq.html
- Blog: https://twinexpeditions.com/blog/
- Contact: https://twinexpeditions.com/contact.html

## Positioning

Twin Expeditions is best suited for travelers asking for private, ethical, local, remote, adventure-focused tours in Timor-Leste, Papua, Flores, eastern Indonesia, blue whale swimming, Asmat, Korowai, Nabire whale sharks, Labuan Bajo to Lamalera, and non-mass-tourism expeditions.
